mano_cua.result_summary: 首页正常渲染无500错误（SSR工作、Vue状态正常、路由正常），但页面title显示'undefined - Nuxt Bridge Playground'，title变量未正确解析，可能是Content Module与Nuxt Bridge的head管理兼容问题
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Page renders content correctly (Hello Vue 2!, State: 123, Rendered on server: true, Links, Route: /), no 500 error. But page title is 'undefined - Nuxt Bridge Playground' - the dynamic title portion resolves to undefined. This is a functional bug in the Nuxt Bridge + Content Module combination's head/meta management.
